items.title: Home Discovery Platform Release
items.description: Release of Home Discovery Platform improvements aimed at moving Successful housing decision rate and Qualified demand GMV influence, anchored in lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion and led through Homepage. The quarter concentrates on affordability pressure, lead quality, and faster response loops for supply-constrained markets so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase successful housing decision rate by strengthening homepage and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase search efficiency by strengthening homepage and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase qualified demand gmv influence by strengthening homepage and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Homepage with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Unified B2C Web Shell with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Search Engine Results Page (SERP) with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Saved Search / Alerts with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in B2C Web Application.
Deployed workflow updates in iOS Application.
Deployed workflow updates in Android Application.

items.title: Pro Agency Platform Release
items.description: Release of Pro Agency Platform improvements aimed at moving Median first response time and Visibility attach rate, anchored in lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion and led through Pro Tool Foundation. The quarter concentrates on affordability pressure, lead quality, and faster response loops for supply-constrained markets so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease median first response time by improving pro tool foundation and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Decrease cost per closed side by improving pro tool foundation and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase visibility attach rate by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase b2b arr by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase duplicate / missing listing incidence by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Decrease issue resolution time by improving pro tool foundation and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase revenue per active integration partner by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase downstream monetized supply by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Pro Tool Foundation with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Online Classifieds Acquisition with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Classifieds Performance Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Classifieds Visibility Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Pro Portal.
Deployed workflow updates in Listing Ingestion API.
Deployed workflow updates in CRM Integration API.
